MM.BoardRoot.purpose: Full iPhone landscape game board container.
MM.BoardRoot.dataSource: BoardViewModel composed from XMage game state.
MM.BoardRoot.interactionBehavior: Coordinates child zones and global overlays.

MM.BattlefieldSurface.purpose: Dark stone and magical tabletop surface.
MM.BattlefieldSurface.dataSource: Static theme tokens plus board state flags.

MM.OpponentVerticalHUD.purpose: Opponent name, life, commander, hand, library, graveyard, exile, status/timer.
MM.OpponentVerticalHUD.dataSource: Opponent player state from XMage snapshot.
notAllowedManualEdits: turning into a horizontal top bar
MM.OpponentVerticalHUD.interactionBehavior: Tap can open opponent detail; counts remain live.

MM.OpponentBattlefieldCards.interactionBehavior: Targetable cards glow during target prompts.

MM.PlayerBattlefieldCards.interactionBehavior: Tap permanent to tap/use; open contextual menu only when multiple legal actions exist.

notAllowedManualEdits: replacing cards with one static image
MM.PlayerHandRail.interactionBehavior: Drag card to cast/play; tap or long press to inspect.

MM.SelectedCardLift.purpose: Lifted/glowing selected hand or battlefield card.
MM.SelectedCardLift.dataSource: Selected card ID and legal actions.
notAllowedManualEdits: covering prompts or primary flow button
MM.SelectedCardLift.interactionBehavior: Selection previews actions without submitting by default.

MM.DragGhostCard.purpose: Ghost representation of the card being dragged.
notAllowedManualEdits: showing when no drag is active

MM.DragDropZoneCast.interactionBehavior: Accepts dragged castable/playable card only when legal.

MM.DragDropZoneBattlefield.dataSource: Legal permanent or land play validation.
MM.DragDropZoneBattlefield.interactionBehavior: Accepts dragged land/permanent only when rules allow.

MM.ValidTargetGlow.purpose: Glow around valid target cards or players.
MM.ValidTargetGlow.interactionBehavior: Tap target submits only after prompt requires a legal target.

MM.InvalidTargetDim.interactionBehavior: Invalid targets do not submit commands.

MM.RightPhaseRail.purpose: Compact phase and step rail on right side.
MM.RightPhaseRail.dataSource: Current phase, step, active player, priority owner.
MM.RightPhaseRail.interactionBehavior: Read-only except optional phase detail tap.

MM.PrimaryFlowButton.interactionBehavior: Pass, Next, Resolve, Done, Continue, or Submit depending on state.

MM.StackExpandedSheet.dataSource: Full stack object list and priority order.
MM.StackExpandedSheet.interactionBehavior: Inspect stack and choose legal responses only.

MM.PromptOverlay.interactionBehavior: Fail-closed prompt UI; submit disabled until valid.

MM.ManaPrompt.dataSource: Mana pool, costs, payable sources, selected payment.
MM.ManaPrompt.interactionBehavior: Select exact payment before Submit enables.

MM.SearchPrompt.dataSource: Search prompt filter and eligible cards.
MM.SearchPrompt.interactionBehavior: Submit enabled only after legal selection.

MM.CommanderReplacementPrompt.dataSource: Commander replacement event and destination options.
MM.CommanderReplacementPrompt.interactionBehavior: Player explicitly chooses graveyard/exile/etc. or command zone.

MM.DamageAssignmentPrompt.dataSource: Blockers, combat assignment order, remaining damage.
MM.DamageAssignmentPrompt.interactionBehavior: Submit enabled only when assignment is legal.

MM.ZoneChips.interactionBehavior: Tap opens the requested zone sheet.

MM.CommandZoneChip.dataSource: Command zone cards and commander tax.

MM.LibraryChip.dataSource: Library count and active search permission.
notAllowedManualEdits: allowing library browsing when game state forbids it
MM.LibraryChip.interactionBehavior: Tap opens library only in legal contexts or count detail otherwise.

MM.CardInspectorSheet.interactionBehavior: Long press or info action opens; dismiss returns to board.

MM.AIThinkingStatus.dataSource: Opponent AI and bridge wait state.

MM.BridgeStatusPill.purpose: Bridge online, waiting, stalled, or reconnecting status.
MM.BridgeStatusPill.interactionBehavior: Tap may show bridge status sheet; fail closed when disconnected.

MM.UnsupportedPromptFallback.purpose: Visible safe fallback for unknown prompts.
MM.UnsupportedPromptFallback.interactionBehavior: Blocks submission until user or implementation handles prompt safely.

MM.DebugSheet.interactionBehavior: Opens tucked debug/settings sheet only on demand.
